texts.orig: Rates are per room per night, in USD & inclusive of all taxes. Minimum stay between 20th Dec and 2nd Jan :   4 Nights To apply the resident rate use 1$ = 114 Ksh as exchange rate

texts.orig: HB = Breakfast, 3-course dinner or buffet FB = Only available for groups of min. 20 people; either buffet or 2-course a-la-carte for 20$ per person Excluding drinks, except two 0.7L bottles of water/guest/day No food or drinks from outside, no single use plastics
texts.text: HB = Breakfast, 3-course dinner or buffet FB = Only available for groups of min. 20 people; either buffet or 2-course a-la-carte for 20$ per person Excluding drinks, except two 0.7L bottles of water/guest/day No food or drinks from outside, no single use plastics

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Free Cancellation within 48hrs after confirmation date. 89 - 30 days prior to arrival = 25% of total invoice. 29 - 15 days prior to arrival = 75% of total invoice. 14 days or less prior to arrival = 100% of total invoice.
texts.text: Free Cancellation within 48hrs after confirmation date. 89 - 30 days prior to arrival = 25% of total invoice. 29 - 15 days prior to arrival = 75% of total invoice. 14 days or less prior to arrival = 100% of total invoice.

texts.orig: Deposit of 25% is required upon booking Remaining 75% to be paid at least 2 weeks prior arrival Groups & safaris with custom payment conditions
